positive: A highly detailed, minimalist graphic design suitable for apparel print. The central subject is a stylized celestial map featuring interwoven constellations (Ursa Major, Orion, Lyra) depicted using elegant, geometric line work. Incorporate celestial elements like crescent moons, zodiac symbols, and glowing star dust rendered as fine pointillism. The color palette must be deep midnight blues, subtle aquamarine, vibrant cosmic purple, and brilliant gold leaf accents. The composition should be perfectly centered and balanced, designed as a circular or medallion emblem with a clean, crisp silhouette. The style is a blend of Art Deco geometry and cosmic mythology, ensuring high contrast and visual punch. High resolution, vector-like perfection, suitable for DTG printing.
